subject: Granite Cave — a large stone-walled cave interior with tiered rocky ledges and earthy tones
description: The interior of a spacious stone cave is depicted, with tiered rough-hewn rock ledges climbing from the foreground toward a dimly lit back wall. The walls and floor are rendered in warm earthy tones — sandy browns, tans, and deep reds — suggesting sedimentary stone or sandstone. The space appears large and traversable, like a dungeon or natural cavern used as a location in a game. The lighting is diffuse, casting gentle shadows across the rock formations. No figures or Pokemon are visible.
foreground: tiered rocky ledge in warm sandy stone
background: deep cave wall receding into shadow
